metadata.name: gpcrmining
metadata.summary: Functions to scrape GPCR data from the web.

functions.name: gpcrmining.gpcrdb.structure.get_pdb_structure_info
documentation:
Gets info about a PDB structure from the GPCRdb

Parameters
----------
    pdbid : str
        PDB ID of the structure. Can be upper- or lowercase. 
        
Returns
-------
    structure_info : dict
        A dictionary with information about the PDB structure.

functions.name: gpcrmining.gpcrdb.structure.download_pdb_structure
documentation:
Downloads a structure from the PDB.

Parameters
----------
    pdbid : str
        PDB ID of the structure. Can be upper- or lowercase. 
    directory : str
        Directory in which to save the structure
        
Returns
-------
    pdbid : str
        PDB ID of the structure in lowercase.

functions.name: gpcrmining.gpcrdb.sequence.download_gpcrdb_residues
documentation:
Downloads a sequence with segment annotations and sequential+generic residue numbers from GPCRdb. 
Optionally saves it as CSV file or prints it to the command line.

Parameters
----------
    name : str
        Name of the GPCR to download (as in its GPCRdb URL). 
    directory : str
        Target directory.
        The directory is created if it does not exist.
    show : bool
        Print the sequence to the terminal.
        
Returns
-------
    residue_info : list
        A list in which each item contains the following strings:
        - part of the residue
        - sequential residue number
        - amino acid 1-letter code
        - GPCRdb residue ID
Functions to obtain residue information from the GPCRdb

functions.name: gpcrmining.gpcrdb.sequence.get_residue_info
documentation:
Gets residue info from the GPCRdb

Parameters
----------
    name : str
        Name of the protein to download (as in its GPCRdb URL). 
    num_scheme : str
        Alternative numbering scheme to use. 
        If None, use the system used for display in the GPCRdb.
        Only works for GPCRs, not for arrestins or G proteins.
    verbose : bool
        Print info about the numbering scheme.
        
        
Returns
-------
    residue_info : list
        A list in which each item contains the following strings:
        - part of the residue
        - sequential residue number
        - amino acid 1-letter code
        - GPCRdb residue ID

functions.name: gpcrmining.gpcrdb.sequence.scrape_residue_info
documentation:
Scrapes residue info from the GPCRdb website html

Parameters
----------
    name : str
        Name of the GPCR to download (as in its GPCRdb URL). 
        
Returns
-------
    residue_info : list
        A list in which each item contains the following strings:
        - part of the residue
        - sequential residue number
        - amino acid 1-letter code
        - GPCRdb residue ID

functions.name: gpcrmining.gpcrdb.sequence._extract_gpcrdb_residue_html
documentation:
Extracts the relevant lines for all residues from a GPCRdb html entry.

Parameters
----------
    txt : str
        Content (html) of the website with the GPCRdb entry.

Returns
-------
    residue_html : list
        A list in which each item contains the html lines for one residue.

functions.name: gpcrmining.gpcrdb.sequence._extract_gpcrdb_residue_info
documentation:
Extracts the relevant info from GPCRdb html entries of residues.

Parameters
----------
    residue_html : list
        A list in which each item contains the html lines for one residue.

Returns
-------
    residue_info : list
        A list in which each item contains the following strings:
        - part of the residue
        - sequential residue number
        - amino acid 1-letter code
        - GPCRdb residue ID

functions.name: gpcrmining.gpcrdb.sequence.load_as_array
documentation: Functions to load a receptor data file

functions.name: gpcrmining.gpcrdb.sequence.sequential_to_gpcrdb
documentation:
Gets GPCRdb number for residues provided as sequential residue number.

Parameters
----------
gpcr_name : str
    Name of the GPCR as in the GPCRdb.
resnums : list of int
    Sequential residue numbers.
    
Returns
-------
dbnums : list of str
    GPCRdb numbering of the residues.

functions.name: gpcrmining.gpcrdb.sequence.gpcrdb_to_sequential
documentation:
Gets sequential residue numbers for residues provided as GPCRdb numbers.

Parameters
----------
gpcr_name : str
    Name of the GPCR as in the GPCRdb.
resnums : list of str
    Residue numbers in GPCRdb format without AA name, e.g., '5.42x43'.
    
Returns
-------
dbnums : list of int
    Sequential numbers of the residues.
